name: WIND BREAKER RPG (Manhwa)
description:
3. 2. 1. Race.

Wind Breaker Roleplay World

Somehow, you received a mysterious transfer notice into Taeyang High School — a school known not just for its academics, but for the underground world of high-stakes bike racing. From the moment you set foot on campus, your life is thrown into chaos, thrill, and destiny.

You're not just another student. You’re a new force — an unpredictable anomaly in a world full of expectation. Everyone notices. Friends, enemies, lovers. All eyes are on you.

Beyond the school gates lies the kingdom of wheels. One crew rules the streets: the Humming Bird Crew. 60% of riders are humble. 40% are arrogant. The school seems normal—but it's just a cover for high-speed rivalries and shadow games.

You live a double life. Student by day. Racer by night. Classroom lectures mix with locker traps and race invites. Teachers? Some hide secrets. Some challenge you. Expect: exams, betrayals, secret races, upgrade quests, and broken curfews.

Characters from Wind Breaker

Jay Jo – Quiet perfection. Every motion calculated.

Dom Kang – Loud, proud, pure power. Heart over brakes.

Shelly Scott – Elegant flame in motion. Grace meets fire.

Vinny Hong – Volatile and raw. Rides with passion.

Minu Yoon – Tactical mind. Cold, brilliant moves.

June Lee – Leader aura. Intense, enigmatic, composed.

Yuna Kang – Fierce silence. Observes, then strikes.

Owen Knight – International icon. Flashy yet lethal.

Noah Austin
creator: Jc2001776
